description_long: This is a compact, vintage-style car with a rounded, streamlined body painted in a light blue color. The vehicle features two doors on each side, small circular headlights at the front, and a simple, classic grille. The windows are relatively small and tinted black, and the wheels are modest in size with hubcaps matching the car's era. The rear of the car has louvered vents on the engine cover, small rectangular taillights, and a single rear bumper. The overall design suggests a mid-20th-century European city car, likely intended for urban commuting and short trips.
description: A small, vintage light blue car with rounded edges, two doors per side, and classic circular headlights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded hood, circular headlights, and simple grille.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two doors, compact body, and small wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying louvered engine vents, rectangular taillights, and a single rear bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the two doors and streamlined profile.
attribute_headlight_design: Two round single headlights, symmetrically placed on either side of the front grille

license_info.creator_display_name: Museum of Engineering and Technology, Krakow
